prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up is a consistently unremarkable process, characterized by a gradual transition from unconsciousness to awareness, often accompanied by the immediate realization of pending responsibilities or a lingering desire to remain inert. The product, if one can call it that, lacks customization—users cannot opt for a “snooze” feature that actually works or a built-in motivational component to counteract the inertia of rising. While the experience is essential for functional participation in daily life, its design feels anachronistic, relying on external stimuli (e.g., alarms, sunlight) rather than intuitive, user-centered ergonomics. Overall, it is a necessary yet uninspired daily occurrence that rarely exceeds expectations.
